svg.title: Memoria Git-for-Data story timeline demo
svg.desc: A smooth story-writing timeline: the first three beats grow on the main line, a detached branch appears from an idea bulb, two branch beats are explored, the branch glides upward and merges into main, later beats are rolled back to beat six, and new beats continue from there.
svg.text: Every change is safe to try, easy to undo
AI memory that branches, merges, and rolls back
Watch Memoria's Git-for-Data model in action — branch an idea, merge what works, roll back what doesn't.

g.text: Building the main memory timeline, beat by beat.
A new idea sparks — what if Mira stays instead of leaving?
New beats committed to main memory. The story moves forward.

text.tspan: — discard weak turns, resume from strength

g.text: Every change is safe to try, easy to undo. That's Git for Data.
